perks.summary: measure per-step bwrap overhead from exod's attested meters (P2-T07); p95 must be <= 100ms (P2-T09 bwrap budget)
time a real Firecracker microVM cold boot (<=1500ms) + warm snapshot-resume (<=250ms) through /dev/kvm (P2-T09 microVM budget); skipped/raises without hardware virtualization, never faked
multi-tenant org isolation (P5-T03) — org→principals→SPIFFE; per-org roots; revocation; cross-org matrix refused
P5-T02 — dashboard SSE push replaces the 1.5s poll: end-to-end push latency from a recorded decision to the streamed event (budget <=1500ms) + bounded per-push payload (pagination caps it)
P5-T05 — W3C traceparent across planes + in-toto provenance: a governed run carries one trace id claim→grant→step; the cross-plane trace + the cyberware/run@v1 attestation are retrievable by run_id
P6-T16 — single-writer-per-currency group-commit throughput + O(accounts) checkpoint-resume: tps>=200, per-batch p95<=250ms, resume-verify<=2s (representative)
